message:
🌱 Add atlantis: Support `atlantis import` subcommand mission (#931)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-217-support-atlantis-import-subcommand",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Support `atlantis import` subcommand",
+    "description": "Support `atlantis import` subcommand. Requested by 95+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current atlantis deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your atlantis version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nhelm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working atlantis installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\nTerraform support importing existing resources in to the TF state file by way of the `terraform import` command. [Typical usage](https://www.terraform.io/docs/import/usage.html) looks like this:\n\n1. Create resource that represents existing resource."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support `atlantis import` subcommand",
+        "description": "## what\n\n- introduce `import` workflow step\n  - import step process `terraform import` and discard plan file, cause existing plan file cannot be used anymore.\n- `import` workflow run `init` and `import` steps\n- command runner can handle `atlantis import ADDRESS ID`\n  - currently import run on a\n```yaml\nworkflows:\n  standard-with-custom-args:\n    plan:\n      steps:\n      - init\n      - run: /usr/local/bin/parse-custom-args.sh\n      - plan\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support `atlantis import` subcommand\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## what\n\n- introduce `import` workflow step\n  - import step process `terraform import` and discard plan file, cause existing plan file cannot be used anymore.\n- `import` workflow run `init` and `import` steps\n- command runner can handle `atlantis import ADDRESS ID`\n  - currently import run on a single project only. this is because we don't run import on multiple projects in the general use-case.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "workflows:\n  standard-with-custom-args:\n    plan:\n      steps:\n      - init\n      - run: /usr/local/bin/parse-custom-args.sh\n      - plan"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "atlantis",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "atlantis"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/217",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/pull/2783"
+    },
+    "reactions": 95,
+    "comments": 25,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:29:41.139Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
